mapper.select: SELECT T.TASK_NO , T.TASK_TTL , T.TASK_CN , T.TASK_STTS , T.TASK_PRGRT , T.TASK_IMPT , T.TASK_BGNG_DT , T.TASK_END_DT , P.PRTPNT_NO , P.EMP_ID , P.PRTPNT_COLOR , E.EMP_NM FROM TASK T LEFT JOIN TASK_PARTICIPANT P ON T.TASK_NO = P.TASK_NO LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON P.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE T.PROJ_NO = #{projNo} ORDER BY CASE T.TASK_IMPT WHEN '높음' THEN 1 WHEN '보통' THEN 2 WHEN '낮음' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END ASC, T.TASK_NO DESC

select PROJ_NO from PROJECT
WHERE PROJ_END_DT < SYSDATE AND PROJ_STTS != '지연' AND PROJ_STTS != '완료'

select EMP_ID from PROJECT
WHERE PROJ_END_DT < SYSDATE AND PROJ_STTS != '지연' AND PROJ_STTS != '완료'
mapper.update:
UPDATE PROJECT SET PROJ_STTS = '지연'
WHERE PROJ_END_DT < SYSDATE AND PROJ_STTS != '지연' AND PROJ_STTS != '완료'
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, B.* FROM TASK A JOIN TASK_PARTICIPANT B ON A.TASK_NO=B.TASK_NO
WHERE A.TASK_END_DT < SYSDATE AND A.TASK_STTS != '지연' AND A.TASK_STTS != '완료'
ORDER BY A.TASK_NO ASC
